title: Mango's Custom Mob Stats
description: A data pack which buffs hostile mob's health and adds some advancements.
body:
## Welcome to Mangos' Custom Mob Stats
A data pack intended to make the game harder by boosting the attributes of mobs.

All hostile mobs have modified health, speed, and armor (limited to mobs that have armor support). This also adds 4 advancements for when the player installs the data pack, kills the wither, warden, and lastly the ender dragon.

The mobs that have armor are:
- Zombies
- Skeletons

Also, some mobs have abilities:

- Zombies: Able to spawn 1 vanilla zombie every few seconds
- Spiders: Are able to create cobweb traps every few seconds on where they are at
- Creepers: When spawning, they summon 3 tnt which explode in a cluster bomb
- Wither: Every few seconds, they summon a barrage of soul explosions

More advancements and features coming soon.
